title: pseudodictamnus mediterraneus subsp. mediterraneus
intro: Pseudodictamnus mediterraneus subsp. mediterraneus, also known as Rock Thyme or Mediterranean Dittany, is a perennial plant native to the Mediterranean region characterized by its red or pink flowers and leaves with a strong fragrance. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antibacterial, and antifungal properties, making it effective in treating wounds, infections, and digestive issues. The health benefits of Pseudodictamnus mediterraneus subsp. mediterraneus include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve digestion, and boost the immune system. The plant is commonly used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be consumed to reap its medicinal and health benefits.
